site.title: IndeepIT Limited
site.description: IndeepIT Limited — software development, marketing, and brand management. Brands that grow. Results that last.

hero.subtitle: We create products that perform and grow with your business.

about.title: WE BUILD THE TOOLS YOUR BUSINESS NEEDS TO GROW FASTER
about.descriptionBefore: IndeepIT Limited is a software development and brand management company that helps businesses grow through smart technology and sharp marketing. We don't just write code or run campaigns — we connect the two,

services.label: Services
services.title: SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT, MARKETING, AND BRAND MANAGEMENT — UNDER ONE ROOF
paragraphs: IndeepIT Limited combines technical expertise and creative strategy to help businesses build better products and stronger brands.
Whether you need a custom platform, a go-to-market strategy, or a brand identity that stands out — we build it with you, not just for you.

values.sectionSubtitle: Three principles behind everything we do.

cards.title: Precision
cards.description: Good software and strong brands both start with the same thing — understanding exactly what the problem is. We ask the right questions, define the right goals, and build solutions that actually fit.

cards.title: Ownership
cards.description: We treat every project as if it's our own. That means staying accountable, keeping things moving, and never losing sight of the outcome we're working toward.

cards.title: Impact
cards.description: Technology and marketing are only valuable if they create real results. We measure success by what changes for your business — not by what looks good on a report.

footer.ctaLine1: READY TO BUILD SOMETHING THAT LASTS?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
intro: This Privacy Policy describes how IndeepIT Limited ("we", "us") processes personal data when you visit our website or contact us.
If you have questions about this policy or your data, you can reach us using the contact details at the end of this page.

sections.title: Who we are
content: IndeepIT Limited provides software development, marketing, and brand management services. Depending on your interaction with us, we may process limited personal data to respond to enquiries and operate our website.

sections.title: Information we may collect
content: Contact details you provide (such as name and email address) when you message us.
Technical data related to website usage (such as IP address, device type, and basic analytics), where enabled.
Communication content you choose to share with us in emails or forms.

sections.title: How we use information
content: We use personal data to respond to enquiries, provide information about our services, improve website security and performance, and comply with legal obligations where applicable.

sections.title: Retention
content: We retain personal data only for as long as needed for the purposes described in this policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law.

sections.title: Contact
sections.intro: For privacy-related requests, please contact us at:
content: You can email us at info@indeepit.co. Please include enough detail for us to verify and process your request.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
intro: These Terms and Conditions govern your use of the IndeepIT Limited website and any enquiries you submit through it.
By using this website, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the website.

sections.title: Website use
content: The content on this website is provided for general information about IndeepIT Limited and our services. We aim to keep information accurate, but we do not warrant that content is complete or up to date.

sections.title: No professional advice
content: Nothing on this website constitutes legal, financial, or other professional advice. Any engagement for services is subject to separate agreements and scoping.

sections.title: Intellectual property
content: Unless otherwise stated, website content, branding, and materials are owned by IndeepIT Limited or its licensors. You may not copy, modify, or distribute materials without permission.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, IndeepIT Limited is not liable for any indirect or consequential losses arising from your use of the website.

sections.title: Contact
content: Email info@indeepit.co and we will respond as soon as reasonably practicable.
